location.heading: Why examples work better than explanations in compliance training

findings.sentence: A recent large-scale study on AI-supported learning found that exposure to high-quality, worked examples—shown in context and aligned to clear performance standards—led to lasting improvements in independent performance, even after the AI was removed ( [Lira et al., 2025](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.02880)).
